About

Finance, built for
founders who move fast.

I became a CA not just to understand balance sheets, but to understand how businesses are actually built — the decisions, the trade-offs, the capital that makes them possible.

Over five years, I've moved from auditing PSU bank portfolios exceeding ₹5,000 Cr in aggregate balance sheet size, to anchoring a USD 3.75M Pre-Series A raise for an AI-driven EdTech startup. Today I serve VC-backed founders, family offices, and fast-growing businesses as their Virtual CFO and strategic finance partner.

My edge is at the intersection of compliance rigour and commercial thinking — whether that's structuring a holding company in Singapore, navigating FEMA filings, or building the investor MIS that earns a board's confidence.

Known for: End-to-end fundraising · Cross-border structuring · FEMA/RBI compliance · Investor-grade reporting · GST & DTAA planning

Global Playbook

Built to go global
from day one.

We operate at the intersection of finance, law, and growth strategy, enabling startups to go global from day one. Whether you're incorporating a holdco in Singapore, structuring FDI into India, or navigating DTAA for cross-border royalties — we handle the complexity so you can focus on building.

Our advisory spans India, Singapore, Dubai (DIFC), Mauritius, Delaware, and the UK — covering entity setup, tax structuring, FEMA/RBI compliance, transfer pricing, and multi-jurisdiction reporting.

6+
Jurisdictions covered — India, Singapore, Dubai, Mauritius, Delaware, UK

Compliance — FC-GPR, FC-TRS, ODI, GST, TDS, DTAA

Virtual CFO & Investor Reporting

Monthly finance clarity — without a full-time hire.

I act as your embedded finance partner: owning the numbers, building the dashboards, and making sure your board always has what they need before they ask.

  • 3-statement financial models (P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow)
  • Monthly MIS, board packs & investor update decks
  • Runway modelling & burn-rate monitoring
  • Unit economics dashboards — CAC, LTV, Contribution Margin
  • Budget vs actuals tracking & reforecasting

  • Data room structuring
  • Due diligence support & query management
  • Term sheet review & closure coordination

FEMA / RBI & Compliance

Compliance that keeps up with your growth.

One missed FC-GPR or delayed RBI filing can freeze your round.

  • FC-GPR & FC-TRS filings for every FDI round
  • RBI approvals, FEMA compliance & ODI filings
  • Companies Act, ROC filings & LLP compliance
  • NBFC regulatory frameworks under RBI
  • Annual compliance calendar management
